notes: PARTIAL/BROKEN — Qwen3.5 has 3 compounding issues on M4 MLX: (1) infinite <think> loop under greedy decode (eval used --no-thinking workaround), (2) DeltaNet linear_attn layer crashes during batched decode with OffsetCache not subscriptable error, (3) even with no-thinking, MMLU answers are 16.7% (near-random 25%) suggesting 4-bit DeltaNet quality regression. See memory project_qwen35_thinking_loop_mlx + project_qwen35_deltanet_decode_crash.
